case_title: DANG, GURSON S. vs. CORDOBA, RENE, AKA RENE LOPEZ et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: JACOME, ALEJANDRO I SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR CORDOBA, RENE, AKA RENE LOPEZ

JUDGE PRO TEM:CATHY MOSBRUCKER/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR:SANDRA NAYLOR C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLFF GURSON DANG PRESENT & REPRESENTING HIMSELF. CSL ALEJANDRO I JACOME APPEARED FOR DEFTS RENE CORDOBA AND JILMA LOPEZ (AKA IRMA CORDOBA). BOTH DEFTS DID NOT APPEAR. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS ON RECORD. TRIAL DATE VACATAED.
